locale.description: This is an example of using next-intl in the `app` directory.
locale.title: next-intl example

home.subtitle: If you can see this, routing + dev server work.
home.title: Hello from Next in Docker 👋

notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
notFound.title: Page not found

contact.description: If you have any questions about this policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact the development team through our <link>GitHub repository</link>.
contact.title: Contact

dataCollected.description: When you use our platform, we may collect the following information:

items.email: Email address (used for account registration and authentication)
items.technical: Technical data (browser type, device information, and IP address for security purposes)
items.usage: Usage data (game history, scores, and interaction logs)
items.username: Username (chosen by you to identify yourself in the game)

dataCollected.title: Data Collected

dataUsage.description: The data we collect is used exclusively for the following purposes:

items.communication: Sending necessary communications related to your account
items.gameplay: Providing the game experience and social features

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Data

privacy.intro: At Transcendence, we value your privacy. This policy describes what data we collect, how we use it, how we store it, and what rights you have regarding your personal information.

rights.description: As a user, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

items.access: Right to access your personal data
items.deletion: Right to request deletion of your data

rights.title: Your Rights

storage.description: Your data is stored securely on our servers. We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS), secure password hashing, and regular security audits. We retain your data only for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you with our services.
storage.title: Data Storage and Security

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

acceptance.description: By creating an account or using our services, you agree to these conditions in their entirety. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must refrain from using the platform.
acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms

conduct.description: To maintain a fair, respectful, and fun environment, you agree not to:

items.cheating: Use cheats, automation software (bots), or hacks to gain an advantage.
items.disruption: Attempt to disrupt the integrity or security of our servers.
items.harassment: Harass, abuse, or engage in behavior that harms the community or other players.

conduct.title: User Conduct

contact.description: If you have any questions or wish to exercise your rights, please contact the development team by opening an issue on our <link>GitHub repository</link>.
contact.title: Contact Us

disclaimer.description: Transcendence is an educational and community-driven project. Consequently, the service is provided as is and as available. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free.
disclaimer.title: Disclaimers

terms.intro: Welcome to Transcendence. Your use of this platform is subject to the following Terms of Service, which govern the relationship between you and the development team.

ip.description: All content, including game code, graphics, and trademarks, is the property of Transcendence. We grant you a limited, non-transferable license for personal, non-commercial use.
ip.title: Intellectual Property

law.description: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws applicable to digital services within the scope of this project's jurisdiction.
law.title: Governing Law

registration.description: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

items.accuracy: You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration.
items.security: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

registration.title: Account Registration

termination.description: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our sole discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties.
termination.title: Termination

terms.title: Terms of Service

changePassword.description: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
changePassword.title: Change password

identifier.description: Use the email address or username you signed up with.
identifier.label: Email or username

messages.success: Email sent. Wait before trying again.

recover.checkInbox: Check your inbox and follow the instructions to set a new password.
recover.checkSpam: If you can't find it, check your spam folder. If it's not there either, try again later.
recover.sent: We've sent password reset instructions to the address you entered.
recover.title: Check your email

privacy.error: You must accept the Privacy Policy to continue.
privacy.label: I have read and agree to the <link>Privacy Policy</link>

verification.checkInbox: Check your inbox and follow the instructions to activate your account.
verification.checkSpam: If you can't find it, check your spam folder. If it's not there either, you can resend it.
verification.invalidOrExpired: Verification link is invalid or expired.
verification.resendDescription: Enter the email address you used to create your account.
verification.sent: We've sent you an email to confirm your account.
verification.title: Check your email
verification.verified: Email verified. Redirecting to your profile...

guest.body: To find friends, see who's online and play games, you need an account.
guest.title: Connect with the community

validation.INVALID_EMAIL_OR_USERNAME: Enter a valid email address or username.
validation.INVALID_USERNAME: Username must be 3–30 characters and contain only letters, numbers, underscores (_), or hyphens (-).
validation.INVALID_USERNAME_FORMAT: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores (_), and hyphens (-).
validation.USERNAME_TOO_LONG: Username must be no more than 30 characters.
validation.USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username must be at least 3 characters.

errors.AUTH_ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Your account is temporarily locked. Try again later.
errors.AUTH_EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Verify your email before signing in.
errors.AUTH_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to access this resource.
errors.AUTH_INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.AUTH_NO_PENDING_RECOVER: No password reset request was found. Please start again.
errors.AUTH_RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: The verification link is invalid or expired.
errors.AUTH_UNAUTHORIZED: You must be logged in to view this content.
errors.FETCH_FAILED: API request failed. Try again later.
errors.FRIENDSHIP_REQUEST_ALREADY_SENT: A friend request has already been sent.
errors.FRIENDSHIP_REQUEST_NOT_FOUND: Request not found or no longer available.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Validation error: please check the fields and try again.
